title: Public URLs for JDBC driver downloads will be disabled
body:
Beginning September 2026, public S3 links for downloading the [Simba JDBC Driver (Legacy)](/aws/en/integrations/jdbc) will be disabled. After this date, scripts or processes that use direct public links to download the driver will no longer function. In addition, downloading from the [JDBC archive page](https://www.databricks.com/spark/jdbc-drivers-download) will require signing in to Databricks.

To continue using automated downloads, migrate to the Databricks JDBC Driver before September 2026. See [Databricks JDBC Driver](/aws/en/integrations/jdbc-oss).
